fixes.description: Added TP1 partial-feedback branch in multi_strategy_main.py after L3117. Calls regime_feedback.record_trade() and confidence_floor.record_outcome() with partial=True on every TP1 event. Excludes weight_mgr, hold_time_rules, signal_quality, parameter_tuner, continuous_backtest (double-count risk). Fixes 27.2% of trades (160/589) previously invisible to learning systems.
fixes.rollback: Remove the `if event.action == 'TP1':` block (25 lines) from multi_strategy_main.py after L3117
fixes.status: APPLIED — pending live verification at first TP1 close

audit_7_systems_run146.weight_mgr: EXCLUDED — same trade would register twice in strategy weights (TP1 win + final close)
audit_7_systems_run146.regime_feedback: INCLUDED — binned regime stats, partial=True metadata, TP1 feedback useful for regime calibration
audit_7_systems_run146.confidence_floor: INCLUDED — confidence-bin calibration, TP1 is always a win signal, no double-count risk
audit_7_systems_run146.hold_time_rules: EXCLUDED — hold_hours=0 at TP1 would distort minimum-hold statistics
audit_7_systems_run146.signal_quality: EXCLUDED — feature-key win rate would be inflated (TP1 always win + potential loss on TRAILING)
audit_7_systems_run146.parameter_tuner: EXCLUDED — win% distortion from registering same trade twice
audit_7_systems_run146.continuous_backtest: EXCLUDED — validates full-trade returns; partial exit_price/actual_return corrupts validation
